sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Citigroup Umumkan Dividen Kuartalan Sebesar $0,60 per Saham
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. mengumumkan dividen kuartalan sebesar $0,60 per saham biasa, dibayarkan pada 27 Februari 2026, kepada pemegang saham yang tercatat per 2 Februari 2026. Ini menghasilkan dividen tahunan sebesar $2,40 per saham dengan imbal hasil 1,98%. Perusahaan juga mengumumkan dividen untuk beberapa seri saham preferennya, dengan pembayaran dijadwalkan pada pertengahan Februari 2026.

feed.title: Charles River Labs to acquire K.F. Cambodia and PathoQuest SAS By Investing.com
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. announced its plans to acquire K.F. (Cambodia) Ltd. for approximately $510 million and exercise its option to purchase the remaining 79% stake in PathoQuest SAS for about $60 million. These acquisitions are set to strengthen Charles River’s non-human primate supply chain and enhance its biologics testing capabilities with next-generation sequencing solutions. The company also reported improving demand trends, with shares trading near a 52-week high, and a leadership transition plan for 2026.

feed.title: Destination XL holiday sales drop 5.8% amid retail challenges By Investing.com
feed.summary: Destination XL Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:DXLG) reported a 5.8% decrease in comparable sales for the nine-week holiday period ending January 3, 2026, totaling $89.9 million. This decline reflects a challenging retail environment, particularly in stores, despite strategic promotions in their direct business. The company is set to merge with FullBeauty in the first half of fiscal 2026, a transaction expected to create a $1.2 billion retailer with approximately $25 million in cost synergies.

feed.title: Movado group SVP Kennedy sells $26948 in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Michelle Kennedy, SVP of Human Resources at Movado Group Inc, sold 1,290 shares of common stock for $26,948 on December 9, 2025, and acquired 84 shares on January 2, 2026, through phantom stock unit conversion. This comes as Movado Group reported third-quarter adjusted EPS of $0.45, missing analyst expectations, though revenue slightly exceeded forecasts at $186.1 million. Northland has initiated coverage with an Outperform rating and a $30 price target, suggesting current tariff situations may offer a favorable entry point.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips (COP) Price Target Lowered by $6
feed.summary: Piper Sandler analyst Ryan Todd reduced the price target for ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) from $115 to $109, while maintaining an ‘Overweight’ rating, still indicating an approximate 12% upside. Despite a bearish crude oil outlook for 2026, the oil refining market is expected to improve, driven by tighter supply/demand dynamics. The company stands to benefit from potential recoveries of up to $12 billion from Venezuela and boasts an annual dividend yield of 3.33%.

feed.title: A Look At Digital Realty Trust (DLR) Valuation After BofA Downgrade On AI Demand And Development Concerns
feed.summary: BofA Securities downgraded Digital Realty Trust (DLR) from Buy to Neutral due to concerns about slower AI-related demand capture and development concentration in less exposed markets. Despite the downgrade, Simply Wall St's narrative suggests DLR is 20.2% undervalued with a fair value of $197.78, emphasizing its contracted backlog and development pipeline. However, the article also notes that DLR's current P/E of 39.9x is higher than its peers and the sector average, indicating potential valuation risk.

feed.title: Regions Financial's longtime CFO announces his retirement
feed.summary: David Turner, the CFO of Regions Financial for 15 years, is retiring at the end of March 2026. He will be succeeded by Anil Chadha, the company's current controller, who has worked closely with Turner for 15 years. Turner played a key role in the bank's recovery post-financial crisis, leading to 13 consecutive annual profits.

feed.title: Farmers National Banc reminds shareholders to vote on Middlefield merger
feed.summary: Farmers National Banc Corp. (NASDAQ:FMNB) has reminded its shareholders to vote on the proposed merger with Middlefield Banc Corp. (NASDAQ:MBCN) before the virtual shareholder meeting on February 10, 2026. The Board of Directors recommends a vote in favor of the merger, which aims to strengthen Farmers' market position and expand its geographic footprint. FMNB is currently considered undervalued based on InvestingPro data, has maintained dividend payments for 32 consecutive years, and has been profitable over the last twelve months.

feed.title: UPS To Release Fourth-Quarter 2025 Results On Tuesday, January 27, 2026
feed.summary: United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS) announced that it will release its 2025 fourth-quarter results on January 27, 2026, at approximately 6:00 a.m. E.T. Following the release, CEO Carol Tomé and CFO Brian Dykes will host an investor conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET, accessible via live webcast on the UPS Investor Relations page. The webcast audio will remain available on the website for a limited period after the call.

feed.title: Kroger makes several leadership changes
feed.summary: Kroger has announced several new leadership appointments across its retail divisions and the upcoming retirements of two long-serving senior leaders. Victor Smith is promoted to senior vice president of Retail Divisions, Monica Garnes will lead the Atlanta Division, Ken DeLuca is appointed president of the Fry’s Division, and Kendra Doyel will head the Ralphs Division. Tom Schwilke and Colleen Juergensen are retiring after extensive careers with the company.

feed.title: Jabil Announces Annual Meeting of Stockholders
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) announced its Annual Meeting of Stockholders will be held virtually on January 22, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EST. Stockholders registered by November 28, 2025, can attend, vote, and ask questions through an online platform, with a live audio webcast available on Jabil's Investor Relations website. The company also provides information on its comprehensive engineering, supply chain, and manufacturing solutions.

feed.title: Time Names Ford The Most Iconic Company In America
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company has been recognized by Time magazine and Statista as the most iconic American company, topping a list of 250 U.S. companies for its significant impact on culture, business, and daily life. The distinction highlights Ford's pioneering role in manufacturing with the assembly line and its continued influence through its dominant market presence in trucks and commercial vehicles, along with investments in electric vehicles. General Motors also ranked highly, placing seventh overall, acknowledging its long-standing presence and ongoing contributions to the American auto industry.

feed.title: Boston Scientific plans expansion in Maple Grove
feed.summary: Boston Scientific plans to expand its presence in Maple Grove with a new four-story, 300,000-square-foot lab and office facility, to be named the Minnesota Science and Technology Center. The project received planning commission approval and awaits final city council approval on January 20th. This expansion will add significant office and lab space, supporting the growth of Boston Scientific's Cardiovascular businesses and further solidifying its position as Maple Grove's largest employer.

feed.title: Boeing Is Winning With The 737 MAX (NYSE:BA)
feed.summary: Boeing is demonstrating strong commercial momentum, highlighted by a record 145-aircraft order from Alaska Airlines, which significantly boosts the 737 MAX 10 backlog. The company is actively ramping up 737 MAX production, with 97% of its target 84 units per month already sold out. The author maintains a bullish outlook on Boeing's long-term prospects, attributing it to disciplined production, a focus on safety, and increasing free cash flow.

feed.title: EPR Properties Fourth Quarter and Year End 2025 Earnings Conference Call Scheduled for February 26, 2026
feed.summary: EPR Properties announced its fourth quarter and year-end 2025 financial results will be released after market close on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, at approximately 4:15 p.m. ET. A conference call to discuss these results will be hosted by management on Thursday, February 26, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The call will be webcast and accessible via the Investor Center section of EPR Properties' website.

feed.title: Bernstein Says AI Competition Fears Around Broadcom (AVGO) Are Overblown
feed.summary: Bernstein analyst Stacy Rasgon reiterated an Outperform rating on Broadcom (AVGO), dismissing fears about AI competition. The firm believes Broadcom's leadership in AI ASICs, coupled with unmatched innovation and execution, makes these concerns overblown. Through a meeting with company leadership, Bernstein gained conviction that Broadcom's technological, scale, and supply chain advantages will allow it to maintain its dominant position in the AI ASIC space.

feed.title: Netflix Stock Pops on Report It Might Amend Warner Bros Bid to All Cash
feed.summary: Netflix stock rose 1% after a report indicated the company is considering an all-cash offer for Warner Bros. Discovery. This potential move could intensify the bidding war for Warner Bros., as Netflix has been in competition with Paramount Skydance.

feed.title: Firefly Aerospace stock slides nearly 9% as Alpha Block II upgrade puts Flight 7 launch in focus (FLY)
feed.summary: Firefly Aerospace (FLY) stock dropped nearly 9% following the announcement of its Alpha "Block II" rocket upgrade and the upcoming Flight 7 launch. This mission is crucial for testing Block II subsystems in "shadow mode" to establish flight heritage, while the company aims to improve reliability and streamline production. Investors are closely watching Flight 7 results as upgrades carry inherent risks that could impact future launch schedules and investor sentiment.

feed.title: Applied Materials Inc.: The Hidden Engine Powering the AI Chip Boom
feed.summary: Applied Materials Inc. is a critical supplier of semiconductor manufacturing equipment, enabling the AI and high-performance computing boom through its advanced process tools for deposition, etch, inspection, and packaging. The company's comprehensive product portfolio is essential for scaling compute performance and memory density, making it a pivotal player in the semiconductor ecosystem, despite facing cyclical and geopolitical risks. Its stock, AMAT, is viewed as a leveraged bet on the long-term demand for compute and memory, driven by AI, cloud, and connected devices.

feed.title: AT&T pays $1.018B for wireless spectrum, triggering $10.25 payout
feed.summary: Array Digital Infrastructure has successfully closed the sale of a portion of its retained spectrum licenses to AT&T for $1.018 billion. Following this sale, Array's Board of Directors declared a special cash dividend of $10.25 per common share, payable on February 2, 2026, to shareholders of record on January 23, 2026. This transaction is part of Array's strategy to monetize spectrum not included in a previous sale and return value to shareholders.

feed.title: Seagate Technology to Report Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on January 27, 2026
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX) will announce its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results after the U.S. market closes on Tuesday, January 27, 2026. A conference call for the investment community will follow at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET to discuss these results. Interested parties can access the live audio webcast on Seagate’s Investor Relations website.

feed.title: ROLLINS, INC. SCHEDULES DATE FOR RELEASE OF FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR 2025 FINANCIAL RESULTS
feed.summary: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL) announced it will release its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on Wednesday, February 11, 2026, after the market closes. The company will host a conference call on Thursday, February 12, 2026, to discuss these results, providing details for both domestic and international participation as well as a live internet broadcast. Rollins, Inc. is a global consumer and commercial services company specializing in pest control through various brands.

feed.title: MasterBrand to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results on February 10
feed.summary: MasterBrand, Inc. (NYSE: MBC), a leading North American residential cabinet manufacturer, will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, after market close. The company will also host a live conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results and business outlook. A replay of the call will be available afterward for those unable to attend live.

feed.title: GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP Q4 2025 Earnings Preview: Recent $GS Insider Trading, Hedge Fund Activity, and More
feed.summary: This article previews Goldman Sachs Group's (GS) Q4 2025 earnings, expected on January 15th, with analysts forecasting $14.2 billion in revenue and $12.00 EPS. It details recent insider trading activity, showing significant insider sales, alongside hedge fund movements, revealing both additions and removals of GS stock by institutional investors. The report also covers congressional trading, analyst ratings, and price targets for GS.

feed.title: Farmers National Banc Corp. Reminds Shareholders to Vote on Proposed Merger with Middlefield Banc Corp.
feed.summary: Farmers National Banc Corp. is urging its shareholders to vote FOR the proposed merger with Middlefield Banc Corp. ahead of a virtual shareholder meeting on February 10, 2026. The company highlights the merger as a strategic move to enhance long-term shareholder value by expanding its market position and geographic footprint. Shareholders are encouraged to review provided materials and vote by February 9, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time.

feed.title: EA to Release Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results on February 3, 2026
feed.summary: Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) announced it will release its financial results for the fiscal quarter ended December 31, 2025, after market close on Tuesday, February 3, 2026. Due to its recent acquisition agreement, EA will not host an earnings conference call. The financial results and related materials will be available on the company's investor relations website, ir.ea.com.

feed.title: Target silent after federal immigration agents arrest Twin Cities employees, operate near stores
feed.summary: Target Corporation has remained silent regarding federal immigration operations in the Twin Cities, despite incidents including the arrest of two employees at a Richfield store by Customs and Border Patrol agents and ICE operations near other Target locations. Protesters and local officials have criticized Target for its lack of response and urged the retailer to protect employees and customers from federal immigration enforcement. The company's stance contrasts with its public statement following the killing of George Floyd in 2020, and comes amid an escalating "Operation Metro Surge" by the Trump administration.

feed.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Downgraded as Handset Drag Limits Upside, Analyst Says
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst Vijay Rakesh downgraded Qualcomm (QCOM) from Outperform to Neutral, lowering the price target from $200 to $175. The downgrade is primarily due to concerns about handset market drag limiting upside, despite Qualcomm's strong position in AI hardware and progress in non-handset businesses. Mizuho also revised down its revenue and earnings forecasts for FY26 and FY27 to below consensus expectations.

feed.title: EPAM Systems, Inc. Announces Investor Day for March 2026
feed.summary: EPAM Systems, Inc. announced it will host an Investor Day on March 12, 2026, in Boston. The event will feature presentations from the CEO, CFO, and executive team, focusing on the company's long-term growth strategy and AI-driven transformation. Client and partner insights on AI capabilities will also be included, with a live webcast available for remote participants.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips (COP) price target lowered by $6
feed.summary: BofA Securities has lowered its price target for ConocoPhillips (COP) by $6, from $156 to $150. Despite this reduction, the firm maintained its Buy rating on the stock, indicating continued confidence in the company's prospects.

feed.title: Farmers National Banc Corp Announces Merger with Middlefield Banc Corp
feed.summary: Farmers National Banc Corp reminded shareholders to vote for its proposed merger with Middlefield Banc Corp, with the shareholder meeting scheduled for February 10, 2026. The merger aims to enhance shareholder value and market position, with Farmers Bank intended to be the surviving entity. Shareholders are encouraged to vote by February 9, 2026.

feed.title: KLA (KLAC) stock climbs after TD Cowen upgrade and $1,800 target
feed.summary: KLA (KLAC) shares increased by 1.3% after TD Cowen upgraded the chip equipment maker to "buy" and raised its price target to $1,800 from $1,300, citing "leading-edge foundry" as a key growth area. Bank of America also increased its price target to $1,650, while Susquehanna maintained a Neutral rating despite raising its target to $1,500. Investors are closely watching for KLA's fiscal Q2 2026 earnings report on January 29 for further guidance.

feed.title: 6 Analysts Assess Atmos Energy: What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Six analysts have provided their assessments of Atmos Energy (NYSE: ATO) over the past three months, with an average price target of $179.0, reflecting a 4.99% increase from the previous average. This article details individual analyst actions, including rating adjustments and price target changes, and highlights Atmos Energy's strong financial performance with positive revenue growth, high net margin, and robust returns on equity and assets, alongside sound debt management. The company, a fully regulated natural gas utility, serves over 3.3 million customers across several states, with a significant portion of its earnings derived from Texas.

feed.title: Dollar Tree Appoints Daniel Delrosario as Senior Vice President of Investor Relations and Treasurer
feed.summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) has announced the appointment of Daniel Delrosario as Senior Vice President of Investor Relations and Treasurer, effective January 13, 2026. In his new role, Delrosario will manage investor relations and treasury functions, including capital markets strategy and investor engagement, reporting to CFO Stewart Glendinning. He previously held a similar position at Burlington Stores, Inc. and has extensive experience in investment management.

feed.title: Chevron (CVX) in Talks to Expand Oil License in Venezuela
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation (CVX) is reportedly in discussions with the U.S. government to expand its oil license in Venezuela. This expansion would allow the company to return to previous oil export levels of 250,000 barrels per day, from the current 100,000 bpd. Chevron also seeks permission to supply Venezuelan crude to its business partners for allocation in markets outside the U.S., leveraging its long-standing presence and commitment to joint ventures with PDVSA.

feed.title: Why Salesforce (CRM) Shares Are Plunging Today
feed.summary: Salesforce (CRM) shares dropped 6.3% today following a broader sell-off in enterprise software stocks. This was triggered by an analyst downgrade of Adobe, citing slower-than-expected AI tool adoption, and related downgrades for Snowflake, DocuSign, and Asana due to competitive pressures and market commoditization. Despite the significant price drop, which the market appears to view as meaningful, the company's shares are down 4.9% year-to-date and 33% below their 52-week high.

feed.title: Teledyne Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Webcast Details
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated will host a conference call on Wednesday, January 21, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Pacific to discuss its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results. A press release detailing these results will be issued before the New York Stock Exchange opens on the same day. Investors can access the webcast and a replay on the company's website.

feed.title: Kroger Announces Key Leader Updates
feed.summary: Kroger has announced several key leadership appointments and retirements. Victor Smith has been promoted to Senior Vice President of Retail Divisions, while Monica Garnes and Ken DeLuca will assume new presidential roles in the Atlanta and Fry's Divisions, respectively. Additionally, Tom Schwilke and Colleen Juergensen have announced their retirements, with Kendra Doyel stepping into the role of President of the Ralphs Division.

feed.title: Three famous SPDR index funds are getting new State Street names
feed.summary: PDR Services LLC, a subsidiary of Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), has announced name changes for three prominent SPDR exchange-traded funds. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust, SPDR Dow Jones Industrial Average ETF Trust, and SPDR S&P MIDCAP 400 ETF Trust will all be prefixed with "State Street®" in their names. These changes will take effect between January 26 and February 24, 2026.

feed.title: Analyst Raises Halliburton (HAL) Price Target to $36
feed.summary: Susquehanna has raised its price target for Halliburton (HAL) to $36 from $29, maintaining a 'Positive' rating on the shares, indicating an over 10% upside potential. The analyst noted that US drilling activity has held up better than expected, with Halliburton's stock surging over 15% in early 2026 due to potential impacts from US actions in Venezuela. The company also has an international arbitration case against Venezuela for broken contracts, which could lead to compensation if the government changes.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (PSX) Agrees to Acquire Lindsey Oil Refinery in England
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) has agreed to acquire the assets and infrastructure of Lindsey Oil Refinery in northern England. This acquisition will expand the company's footprint in the UK, with plans to integrate the assets into its Humber Refinery complex. Phillips 66 is also positioned to process Venezuelan crude, further strengthening its market position.

feed.title: Valero Energy (VLO) – Among the Best High Yield Crude Oil Stocks to Buy After Trump’s Blitz in Venezuela
feed.summary: Valero Energy (NYSE: VLO) is considered a top high-yield crude oil stock, especially after potential increased Venezuelan oil flow to the US. The company, a premier independent petroleum refiner, is well-equipped to process heavier Venezuelan crude, a factor noted by legendary investor Michael Burry and supported by a raised price target from Mizuho analyst Nitin Kumar. Valero's stock has surged significantly over the last year, although the article suggests AI stocks might offer higher returns with limited downside.

feed.title: SLB Upgraded to Outperform, Price Target Raised to $54
feed.summary: Evercore ISI upgraded SLB (NYSE: SLB) from 'In Line' to 'Outperform' and increased its price target to $54, citing a clearer outlook and strategic repositioning after the ChampionX acquisition and Palliser exit. The upgrade is also influenced by SLB's potential to benefit from renewed access to Venezuela's oil reserves, given its expertise in oilfield services. The company's stock has surged almost 18% since the beginning of 2026.

feed.title: Blue Owl Capital Inc. (OWL) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL), inviting shareholders who suffered losses between February 6, 2025, and November 16, 2025, to join. The lawsuit alleges that Blue Owl failed to disclose significant pressure on its asset base from BDC redemptions, undisclosed liquidity issues, and the likelihood of limiting or halting redemptions. Investors are encouraged to contact Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP to participate before the lead plaintiff deadline on February 2, 2026.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil (XOM) Forecasts Lower Q4 Earnings Due to Decline in Crude Prices
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil (XOM) expects lower Q4 earnings due to a significant decline in crude oil prices, with upstream earnings potentially reducing by up to $1.2 billion compared to the previous quarter. Wall Street analysts forecast adjusted earnings of $1.66 per share for Q4. Despite past issues in Venezuela and caution regarding re-investment, the company is listed among high-yield crude oil stocks.

feed.title: T-Mobile US (NASDAQ:TMUS) Sets New 1-Year Low - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: T-Mobile US (NASDAQ:TMUS) shares recently hit a new 52-week low of $191.87, trading down 4.4% for the session. Despite this dip, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $260.17, driven by strong fundamentals such as beating quarterly EPS estimates and an 8.9% year-over-year revenue increase. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.02, while insiders have sold a significant number of shares recently.

feed.title: Verizon stock slides after FCC loosens phone-unlocking rule as fraud fight takes center stage
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. shares dropped by 2.5% after the FCC removed a rule requiring the carrier to unlock phones 60 days post-activation, a policy Verizon claimed led to significant fraud. This decision aims to combat handset trafficking, but it has sparked concerns among consumer advocates about restricting customers' ability to switch carriers. Investors are watching for the impact of this rule change on key metrics, with Verizon set to release its Q4 2025 earnings soon.

feed.title: Form 424B2 CITIGROUP INC
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc. has filed a Form 424B2 for Callable Contingent Coupon Equity Linked Securities due January 25, 2029, linked to the performance of the Nasdaq-100 Index, Russell 2000 Index, and S&P 500 Index. These unsecured debt securities, guaranteed by Citigroup Inc., offer potential periodic contingent coupon payments at an annualized rate of at least 9.10% but carry risks including potential loss of principal, no coupon payments, and credit risk of the issuers. The article details the key terms, hypothetical examples of payments, and significant risk factors for investors.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $908,000 in Auto Callable Contingent Interest Notes, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are linked to the MerQube US Large-Cap Vol Advantage Index and mature on January 14, 2031. Investors can receive quarterly contingent interest payments if the Index meets specific conditions, but face risks including potential principal loss and the "6.0% per annum daily deduction" from the Index's performance.

feed.title: Alcoa, Kaiser Aluminum cut at Wells Fargo; Constellium new favorite aluminum processor (AA:NYSE)
feed.summary: Wells Fargo downgraded Alcoa (AA) and Kaiser Aluminum (KALU) to Equal Weight from Overweight, citing potential underestimation of substitution risks for aluminum by investors. Meanwhile, Wells Fargo named Constellium (CSTM) as its new favorite aluminum processor. Both Alcoa and Kaiser Aluminum stocks saw slight declines following the downgrade.
